title: potentilla × mulleri
intro: Potentilla × mulleri, also known as the Muller's cinquefoil, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Rosaceae family, derived from the cross between Potentilla fruticosa and Potentilla nitida. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Potentilla × mulleri include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Potentilla × mulleri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
